Nike, NBA Extend Apparel And Content Partnership For 12 More Years
data.description: Nike has been a partner of the NBA since 1992, a marketing partner of the WNBA since 1997, and a G League partner since 2017.

data.title: Rivian Analyst Cuts Estimates On Demand Concerns, Warns Softer Production, Delivery Trends Jeopardize Growth Stock Multiple
data.description: Analysts at JPMorgan believe Rivian Automotive may be starting to experience some softness in demand heading into third-quarter earnings.

data.title: Analysts Predict New Highs For Cybersecurity Stock By Christmas
data.description: Shares of Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ: PANW) have had a stellar year, with shares continuing to build on a 180% rally that started in early 2023.
